character.description: Same locked character as the base anchor: cheerful tiny white lamb-rabbit adventurer with a huge curled white ear-horn ending in a bright blue spiral cap, one upright ear with a blue accent, large blue eyes, pink cheeks, blue scarf and trailing ribbon, curled tail with blue spiral, blue wrist cuffs, tan belt pouch with blue spiral emblem, and blue-white-pink sneakers; strict right-facing game side/three-quarter view.

run.action: right-facing six-phase run cycle: right-foot contact, passing, left-foot contact, passing, and two clear in-betweens; legs alternate, arms counter-swing, ears and scarf ribbon bounce, tail follows the body; frame 6 flows naturally back to frame 1; feet share a stable ground baseline

jump.action: right-facing three-part jump sequence: compact crouch anticipation, clear airborne rise with tucked legs, descending landing-ready pose; scarf and ears follow body motion; readable start-middle-end progression

hit.action: right-facing two-part hurt reaction: normal braced stance then a small backward recoil and flinch; all character accessories remain attached; no blood, gore, detached effects, or extra props

style: Cute polished Korean mobile-game cartoon sprite, white fur with saturated sky-blue accents, clean deep-violet outlines, soft cel shading, compact readable silhouette, non-pixel-art 2D raster
